note: All indexed HTML pages are rebuilt from src/pages/* section components. Root HTML remains static production output.

workflow.edit: edit src/pages/<slug>/sections/*.html or page.json; root HTML is rebuilt from src
workflow.check: npm run check:site-builder && npm run ai:check
workflow.editSharedComponent: edit src/components/shared/*, then run npm run build:site -- --page <affected.html> --write and npm run check:site-builder

sharedComponents.note: Identical repeated section fragments are stored once in src/components/shared and referenced from page.json. Builder output remains byte-identical.
